delivery_mode_reason: Published Devpost instructions list a video demo field and do not list a separate slide-deck field.

frontend.dependency_policy: Frontend deps install with @latest or unversioned targets unless a verified sponsor/runtime blocker is recorded.
frontend.primary_ui_library: Mantine or Radix Themes for dense operations UI
frontend.non_tailwind_visual_signature: split retail mirror plus launch-control timeline; no generic SaaS card wall
frontend.visual_differentiation_note: Uses retail imagery and reliability receipts, avoiding generic purple AI dashboards.
forbidden_lookalikes: beauty try-on toy with no proof surface

qr_mobile_access.entry: QR code opens the live shopper URL directly on mobile.
qr_mobile_access.mobile_primary_flow: Upload photo, pick style brief, view recovered result in <= 2 taps after upload.
qr_mobile_access.desktop_parity_plan: Desktop keeps the full 16:10 mirror/control-room split with trace, fault controls, and replay proof.

asset_sources.logo: logo-generator skill output, 6+ variants required before build
asset_sources.avatars: DiceBear lorelei or initials for operators; no emoji glyphs

domain.name: AI retail operations
domain.professional_context: Launch sessions, shopper journeys, try-on media, conversion risk, replay workflows, provider health, failover, and proof receipts.

ai.agent_pattern: Hermes/NemoClaw-style planning agent with tool calls for try-on, replay, and resilience receipt generation
ai.resilience_layer: TrueFoundry AI Gateway policy and fault telemetry when keys are provided

required_env.name: CRUSOE_API_KEY
required_env.note: Configured with the official Devpost hackathon bearer after Crusoe console personal key creation required card setup.

required_env.name: OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_CRUSOE_ENDPOINT
required_env.required_for: Audit marker: Crusoe Managed Inference is OpenAI-compatible while MirrorRun keeps CRUSOE_API_KEY as the canonical secret
required_env.storage: not used directly; CRUSOE_API_KEY, CRUSOE_BASE_URL, and CRUSOE_MODEL are canonical

required_env.name: PERFECT_API_KEY
required_env.required_for: Perfect Corp try-on or skin/look analysis

required_env.name: PERFECT_API_SECRET
required_env.required_for: Perfect Corp authenticated API calls if required by selected endpoint

required_env.name: TRUEFOUNDRY_API_KEY
required_env.required_for: Gateway, resilience telemetry, and fallback policy

required_env.name: GETLARK_API_KEY
required_env.required_for: Create/invoke replay workflows through Lark CLI or MCP
required_env.storage: .dev.vars, local CLI login, and Wrangler secret

required_env.name: STEP_API_KEY
required_env.required_for: StepFun stepaudio-2.5-tts narration for the final combined pitch-demo video

real_data_sources.evidence: R2 object key and rendered before/after state
API job id/result image or explicit provider error receipt from the official endpoint
streamed agent trace and model receipt
workflow link, CLI output, screenshot/log artifact

real_data_sources.source: TrueFoundry AI Gateway event or policy response
real_data_sources.evidence: gateway request id, fallback event, or explicit provider error receipt

real_data_sources.source: Cloudflare D1 session and event tables
real_data_sources.evidence: session id, timeline rows, deploy URL

prd_coverage.minimum: every P0/P1 REQ-### row has route/API/real-data/test/deploy evidence before recording

extras.auth: single admin token for hackathon operator mode; no full auth in MVP

notes: If any sponsor key is not available before implementation, the integration must show an honest blocker and must not fake receipts. If StepFun is unavailable, do not ship a robotic fallback voice as the final combined pitch-demo.
